name: HMS Amberley Castle (K 386)
events: 18 Dec 1944 HMS Vitality (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Alnwick Castle (A/Lt.Cdr. H.A. Stonehouse, DSC, RNR) and HMS Amberley Castle (T/A/Lt.Cdr. R. Edwards, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
